description: A collection of string manipulation nodes
author: NodeCanvas

nodes.name: StringLength
nodes.description: Returns the length of a string
nodes.code:
def process(text):
    return len(text) if text else 0

nodes.name: Concatenate
nodes.code:
def process(string1, string2):
    s1 = str(string1) if string1 is not None else ''
    s2 = str(string2) if string2 is not None else ''
    return s1 + s2

nodes.name: ToUpperCase
nodes.code:
def process(text):
    return str(text).upper() if text is not None else ''

nodes.name: ToLowerCase
nodes.code:
def process(text):
    return str(text).lower() if text is not None else ''

nodes.name: StringReplace
nodes.description: Replaces occurrences of a substring with another

nodes.name: StringSplit
nodes.description: Splits a string by a delimiter
